title: odontarrhena tortuosa subsp. savranica
intro: Odontarrhena tortuosa subsp. savranica is a plant species commonly found in the Balkan Peninsula and is also known as Savran's toothwort. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Odontarrhena tortuosa subsp. savranica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made by infusing the roots or leaves in water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
